calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Faye Lee Bresler for Don Shek Gee, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Peittion for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court waived the Proof of Substribing Witness and notice of the amendment. Ms. Bresler confirmed no objections were raised to admission of the will.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 25, 2009 was admitted to probate. Don Shek Gee was appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 26, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas was appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Continued To Oct-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Faye Lee Bresler for petitioner Don Shek Gee, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court stated that it intended to continue to allow time for recently submitted filings to be reviewed. No objections were raised.

The Court continued the matter to October 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
